name: Maybelline Fit Me Matte + Poreless Foundation
overview_desc: Ultra-lightweight foundation that absorbs oil for a natural matte finish.

product_page.description: Ideal for normal to oily skin, this exclusive formula features micro-powders to control shine and blur pores.

reviews.comment: The only foundation that doesn't look cakey!

name: Maybelline Lash Sensational Sky High Mascara
overview_desc: Sky high lash impact from every angle.

product_page.description: Delivers full volume and limitless length. Exclusive Flex Tower mascara brush bends to volumize and extend every single lash.

name: Maybelline SuperStay Matte Ink Liquid Lipstick
overview_desc: Intense ink color concentration with a flawless matte finish.

product_page.description: This highly pigmented liquid matte lipstick features a unique arrow applicator for precise application. Up to 16 hours of wear.

name: L’Oréal Paris True Match Liquid Foundation
overview_desc: Skin-matching foundation that provides a natural, skin-like finish.

product_page.description: Formulated with up to 6 pigments for our most precise match. Hyaluronic Acid enriched to improve skin quality in 2 weeks.

name: L’Oréal Infallible Full Wear Concealer
overview_desc: High-coverage formula with a lightweight, matte finish.

product_page.description: Our extra-large applicator provides maximum coverage in one stroke for dark circles, acne scars, and discoloration.

name: MAC Matte Lipstick - Ruby Woo
overview_desc: The iconic retro-matte red that defines classic beauty.

product_page.description: A long-wearing lipstick formula with intense color payoff and a completely matte finish. The world's most famous blue-red.

name: MAC Studio Fix Fluid Foundation SPF 15
overview_desc: Modern foundation with a natural matte finish and broad-spectrum protection.

product_page.description: Combines a matte finish and medium-to-full buildable coverage with broad spectrum SPF 15 protection. Applies and blends easily.

name: Revlon Super Lustrous Lipstick
overview_desc: Infused with Vitamin E and Avocado Oil for creamy comfort.

product_page.description: Vibrant color that feels lightweight and moisturizing. Uses micro-fine pigments so the shades are rich but the feel is light.

name: Revlon ColorStay Longwear Makeup
overview_desc: 24-hour wear foundation for a flawless, natural finish.

product_page.description: Oil-free foundation that stays flawless for up to 24 hours. Formulated with Hyaluronic Acid to hydrate skin for a natural glow.

name: Masarrat Misbah Silk Foundation (BB Cream Style)
overview_desc: Specifically formulated for South Asian skin tones with a silky finish.

product_page.description: A high-performance foundation that mimics the look of healthy skin. It provides a luminous glow while evening out imperfections.
product_page.feature_resolution: Halal Certified, Silk Finish, Weightless Feel.

reviews.comment: Best match for my skin tone ever.

name: Maybelline Hyper Precise All Day Eyeliner
overview_desc: Ultra-fine liquid eyeliner for precise lines.

product_page.description: The 0.4mm tip gives you ultimate control. Waterproof and smudge-proof formula that lasts all day.

name: L’Oréal Paris Volume Million Lashes Mascara
overview_desc: Millionizer brush for volume and defined lashes.

product_page.description: Each lash is coated evenly for a volumized look without clumps. Built-in wiper removes excess mascara.

name: MAC Powder Blush
overview_desc: Professional-grade blush with a range of high-pigment finishes.

product_page.description: Designed by and for professionals, formulated to provide fantastic color with ease and consistency. Blends evenly.

name: Revlon Super Lustrous Nail Enamel
overview_desc: Chip-resistant nail color in classic and trendy shades.

product_page.description: Anti-fade technology helps color stay vibrant longer. Silk-protein formula evening out the nail surface.

name: Maybelline Baby Skin Instant Pore Eraser
overview_desc: Clear primer that blurs pores for a smooth skin feel.

product_page.description: Leaves skin with a smooth matte finish. Lightweight and breathable formula.

name: L’Oréal Glow Mon Amour Highlighting Drops
overview_desc: Highly pigmented liquid highlighter for a luminous glow.

product_page.description: Infused with coconut oil, these drops can be mixed with foundation or applied directly to high points of the face.
product_page.feature_resolution: Liquid Formula, Versatile Use, Dewy Finish.

name: MAC Eye Brows Styler
overview_desc: Self-sharpening, water-resistant brow pencil with a spoolie.

product_page.description: Provides grooming, shape, and color. Mimics fine hair strokes for a natural look.

name: Masarrat Misbah Lip Tint
overview_desc: Lightweight stain for natural-looking lips and cheeks.

product_page.description: A long-lasting stain that blends easily for a healthy flush of color.

name: Revlon ColorStay Pressed Powder
overview_desc: Ultra-fine powder that eliminates shine for 16 hours.

product_page.description: Lightweight and non-drying, this powder won't clog pores or settle into lines. Perfect over foundation or bare skin.

name: Maybelline Lasting Fix Setting Spray
overview_desc: Lock in your look for up to 16 hours with a matte finish.

product_page.description: A fine mist that prevents makeup from fading or smudging. Controls shine for a long-lasting matte effect.

reviews.comment: Makeup stays put in the humidity!
